remainder 48. Nakshatra is Krittika, the eighth from
Dhanishtha. Table IV (B) shows that the time is correct.

64 Rectification of Birth Time
Sunday, Anuradha, at 29.45. Table III corrects it to 29.46.
Thursday, Sravana, at 10.58. The remainder is 28. 28 x 4
divided by 9 gives four as the remainder. Counted from Mula
we get the nakshatra as per Uttara Kalamrita. But 28 x 3
divided by 7 leaves no remainder. If we count it from Sunday,
it turns to be Saturday. But if we count from Friday, we get
Thursday. This is what is meant by taking nakshatra from
one method and the weekday from another.
Since Table IV does not clearly present the method of syn
thesising the two methods we give the two tables, one for the
nakshatras and another for the weekdays
Table V
(A) Following the theory ofUttara Kalamrita we give the
weekdays. The first column gives the Vighatis and the second
the weekday counted from Sunday.
Vighatis Week days
1,8,15,22,29,36,43,50,57 Tuesday
